analytics.title: Insights
analytics.subtitle: See where your money goes and where your income comes from this month.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteAccountWarning: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone and all your financial data will be permanently deleted.
profile.deleteNotAvailable: Account deletion is not available yet. Please contact support.
profile.signOutError: Unable to sign out right now.
profile.languageHint: Applies to the entire app on this device.
profile.currencyHint: How amounts are shown everywhere in the app on this device (display only).

home.subtitle: Let's grow your wealth.
home.transactionClearFailed: Failed to clear transaction. Please try again.

recurring.title: Recurring
recurring.noInstallments: No installments or BNPL commitments yet.
recurring.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this commitment?
recurring.deleteFailed: Failed to delete commitment. Please try again.
recurring.payInstallmentFailed: Failed to register installment payment. Please try again.

garden.title: Garden
garden.subtitle: Save toward your goals — tap a card to add or withdraw like a piggy bank.
garden.emptyHint: Create your first goal and watch your garden grow as you save.

addModal.title: New goal
addModal.name: Goal name
addModal.deadlineHint: Leave empty if you prefer not to set a date.
addModal.mustLogin: You must be logged in to create a goal.
addModal.nameRequired: Please enter a name for your goal.
addModal.invalidTarget: Please enter a valid target amount greater than zero.
addModal.saveFailed: Could not save the goal. Please try again.

piggy.title: Goal piggy bank
piggy.invalidAmount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
piggy.withdrawTooMuch: You cannot withdraw more than you have saved.
piggy.completedToast: You reached “{{name}}”! Goal marked as completed.
piggy.updateFailed: Could not update the goal. Please try again.
piggy.deleteConfirm: Delete the goal “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.

addCommitmentModal.name: Name
addCommitmentModal.mustLogin: You must be logged in to create a commitment.
addCommitmentModal.fillRequired: Please fill in name, monthly amount and next charge date.
addCommitmentModal.invalidAmount: Please provide a valid monthly amount.
addCommitmentModal.installmentFields: Please fill in all installment fields.
addCommitmentModal.installmentValues: Installment values must be greater than zero.
addCommitmentModal.currentGtTotal: Current payment cannot be greater than total installments.

transactionModal.saveError: Error saving transaction. Please try again.

transactionList.noHint: Try adjusting your filters or add a new transaction.

authLogin.title: Welcome back
authLogin.subtitle: Enter your details to access your account.

authRegister.title: Create an account
authRegister.subtitle: Start your wealth-building journey today.
authRegister.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
authRegister.created: Account created successfully! Welcome to Finantree.
authRegister.checkEmail: We sent a confirmation link. Open your email, tap the link to verify your account, then sign in here.

authForgot.title: Reset password
authForgot.subtitleBefore: We'll send you instructions to reset your password.
authForgot.subtitleAfter: Check your email for reset instructions.

pwaInstall.title: Install the Finantree app
pwaInstall.description: Add it to your home screen for quicker access and a smoother experience on your phone.
pwaInstall.iosHint: Tap Share (square with arrow), scroll down, and choose "Add to Home Screen".
pwaInstall.androidHint: Your browser can install the app — use the button below.
pwaInstall.genericHint: In the browser menu, look for "Install app", "Add to Home screen", or similar.

transparency.title: Join {{host}}'s family?
transparency.description: {{host}} set this group with open transparency. Do you want to share your transaction history?

consent.title: Group invite
consent.subtitle: {{name}} invited you to share financial data.
consent.description: If you accept, you can see each other's transactions and goals. You can leave anytime.
